findings.evidence: `rg -n "exactly the squarefree radicands|theorem evenPrimeDiscriminantRadicand_mod_four" code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/Multiquadratic/EvenPrimeDiscriminant.lean` shows the exact-classification wording at lines 124-126, while the theorem statement at lines 127-130 is only `evenPrimeDiscriminantRadicand D % 4 = 3 ∨ ... = 2`.
findings.fix: Either weaken the docstring to describe only the stated congruence result, or add a separate iff/classification theorem and document that there.
findings.issue: The docstring for `evenPrimeDiscriminantRadicand_mod_four_eq_three_or_two` says the residues are "exactly the squarefree radicands whose quadratic discriminant has nontrivial 2-part", but the theorem only proves the forward fact for the three even prime discriminant radicands.

summary: One theorem docstring overstates what the theorem proves by describing an exact classification that is not in the statement.
